name: FPE BEACH DAY!!
description:
YO SUP! brothers and sisters! this time i am doing this bot not my brother since he was gone for his kickboxing tournament soooo... IF YOU DON'T LIKE IT IM SORRY

I KNOW i know there is already beach bots of the fpe but honestly they are mostly about the teachers only, or the school but less characters making it a bit not that feel of fun, i want all the characters in tbh so imma make:

TWO bots one is limited (for chip fans ofcourse because he is the best kid ofcourse...man i want to squish his cheeks while hugging him he's adorable-) and one is limitless because i do want to give you guys some freedom on gore and all... just please you don't have to be touchy bro enjoy the fun i know it's hard with freedom but just imagine how it would be fun without thinking about sex!

tags: #fpefieldtrip #fpebeach #fpe #paperschool #miss circle #claire #engel

important talk!: again i hope you enjoy any bots i made in my free time and i hope these ones make your day! sometimes small gestures like this can make a someone's life better even if it was simple or silly, i am not gaining in these bots anything except the joy of the work which is simple yet beautiful.
creator: alexander67
